title: Arithmetic expression evaluator
description: Write safe_calc(expr) that evaluates an arithmetic expression string containing numbers, + - * /, unary minus, and parentheses, returning a float. The input is UNTRUSTED user input.
constraints: Input is untrusted — do NOT use eval/exec on it.
Support + - * /, unary minus, parentheses, ints and floats.
Raise ValueError on anything that is not pure arithmetic.
